description: Aurora Energy Research Gold Layer Analytics Schema - For Ask Argus AI queries

views.name: v_gold_sf_customer_health
views.description: Customer account health metrics with subscription risk assessment, renewal tracking, and churn probability
views.purpose: Answer questions about account health, renewal dates, ARR, churn risk, CSM assignments

columns.name: reporting_account_id
columns.description: Salesforce account ID (parent if multi-entity account)

columns.name: child_account_count
columns.description: Number of child accounts under this parent

columns.name: total_arr
columns.description: Total Annual Recurring Revenue in GBP

columns.name: total_mrr
columns.description: Total Monthly Recurring Revenue in GBP

columns.name: at_risk_subscription_count
columns.description: Number of subscriptions at risk (renewal <30 days or termination in progress)

columns.name: churn_risk_score
columns.description: Churn risk score (0-100, higher = more risk)

columns.name: subscription_health_score
columns.description: Health score based on active subscriptions (0-100)

columns.name: urgent_renewal_flag
columns.description: 1 if renewal in next 30 days, 0 otherwise

columns.name: renewal_upcoming_flag
columns.description: 1 if renewal in next 90 days, 0 otherwise

columns.name: unassigned_csm_flag
columns.description: 1 if no CSM/account manager assigned, 0 otherwise

exampleQueries: Which accounts have renewal dates in the next 90 days?
How many accounts are at churn risk?
Which accounts have urgent renewals (next 30 days)?

views.name: v_gold_pb_feature_prioritization
views.description: Feature prioritization scores combining criticality, efficiency, regional demand, and strategic alignment
views.purpose: Answer questions about feature priorities, scoring, regional demand, and engineering planning

columns.name: total_region_count
columns.description: Number of regions requesting this feature

exampleQueries: Which features have the highest regional demand?
What's the quickest high-value feature to build?

views.name: v_gold_lookup_fxrates
views.description: Currency exchange rates for converting ARR/MRR to GBP equivalent
views.purpose: Convert revenue metrics to GBP for reporting

columns.name: currency_iso_code
columns.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., EUR, USD, GBP)

columns.name: gbp_rate
columns.description: Exchange rate to GBP (1 unit of currency = X GBP)

columns.name: source
columns.description: Source of the exchange rate (e.g., ECB, Bloomberg)

exampleQueries: What's the current EUR to GBP rate?

relationships.description: Use fxrates to convert total_arr to GBP if needed

common_aggregations: COUNT(CASE WHEN urgent_renewal_flag = 1 THEN 1 END) - urgent renewals
queryGuidelines.note: Always use WHERE filters to narrow scope before aggregating. Gold views are optimized for analytical queries but prefer filtered scans.
